scripts.build: pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk build && pnpm --filter @anyharness/sdk build && pnpm --filter @anyharness/sdk-react build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/design build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-domain build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/ui build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-ui build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-surfaces build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-product-client-qualification-assets.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk build && pnpm --filter @anyharness/sdk build && pnpm --filter @anyharness/sdk-react build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/design build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-domain build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/ui build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-ui build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-surfaces build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
